independence_basis: P06 assigns AlphaSpec drafting to hypothesis_scout and critique to alpha_spec_critic, not statistical_reviewer.
P15 feature and label additions are owned by feature_engineer and label_engineer, not statistical_reviewer.
P16-P22 diagnostics and consolidations are owned by diagnostics_runner, not statistical_reviewer.

judgement.basis: Runtime diagnostics and consolidation evidence remain unresolved by reference: no locked BBO FeaturePack resolves, detailed RTH session cost cells are zero-fill or inconclusive, and the no-lookahead audit carries timing and label flags.

evidence_summary.variant_budget_note: P24 records declared variant budget respected with no locked-test tuning or repeated OOS selection.

limitations: This verdict is an evidence-quality judgement only.
No watch, candidacy, promotion, profitability, tradability, paper, live, broker, deployment, or capital-allocation claim is made.
Zero-cost context is not used as a favorable-evidence basis.
No raw provider data, feature values, label values, runtime values, or heavy artifacts were read or embedded.
